files_modified.migration_notes: Migrated all Agent references to MCPAgentJob. Updated 12 test assertions and synchronization tests. Changed Agent-Job sync tests to pure MCPAgentJob transition tests (no more dual records).

Replaced all Agent imports with MCPAgentJob. Updated legacy agent count queries to use MCPAgentJob. Updated cascade deletion to delete MCPAgentJob records. Updated get_project_summary to build summaries from MCPAgentJob only.

files_modified.reason: Superseded by tool_accessor.py, not exported from __init__.py, no active callers

files_modified.migration_notes: Migrated inter-agent messaging to use MCPAgentJob - replaced Agent lookups for sender/recipient validation and broadcast
Migrated project lifecycle to use MCPAgentJob - replaced Agent queries in list_projects, close_project, project_status
Migrated task-to-agent assignment to use MCPAgentJob - removed legacy Agent creation zombie code, now uses AgentJobManager exclusively

Migrated all 8 agent lifecycle MCP tools to use MCPAgentJob - ensure_agent, activate_agent, assign_job, handoff, agent_health, decommission_agent, spawn_and_log_sub_agent, log_sub_agent_completion. Used AgentJobManager for proper job lifecycle management.
Fixed circular import by implementing lazy import pattern for 'state' from api.app. This was blocking 99.3% of test suite (1,768 tests). Import now happens inside function where it's used.
Added missing imports for DatabaseManager and Request. These were required for project closeout endpoints added during migration.
